name: blockout
description: Blockout — autonomous AI trading agent that blacks out MEV bots on BNB Smart Chain

_comments.hackathon-sdks: @trustwallet/agent-sdk and @bnb-chain/bnbagent-sdk are hackathon SDKs. The agent uses ethers.js v6 for equivalent self-custody signing (TradingEngine + ExecutionService). When these packages are published, replace the ethers wallet logic with TWAK AgentKit calls.
_comments.twak-note: TWAK_ACCESS_ID and TWAK_HMAC_SECRET are pre-loaded in config for TWAK integration readiness. Currently the agent uses a persistent ethers.Wallet stored in data/wallet.key for equivalent self-custody functionality.
